id: list-group-media-people

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"List people mapped to a group"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/api/media/people"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Returns all explicitly-mapped people visible to members of the group.
Face data and source IDs are never exposed to family unless an admin
has mapped them with a `label` and optionally linked them to a user.

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
